fields.criteria: Historically defensible claim that responds to the prompt.
Broader historical context relevant to the prompt.
Uses documents to address topic (1) and supports argument using 6+ documents (2).
Specific evidence beyond the documents, relevant to the argument.
Sourcing (HIPP) for 3+ documents (1) and complex understanding (2).

app_modules_to_build.purpose: Student highlights where each document is used; app counts unique docs used.
Prompts student to add HIPP sourcing for at least 3 docs; provides templates.
Student lists outside evidence; app checks specificity via checklist.
Outputs point-by-point score + what to add next.

variants.name: Rhetorical_Analysis
variants.notes: Explain how rhetorical choices achieve a purpose.

fields.criteria: Defensible thesis responding to the prompt.
Evidence is used and explained to support the line of reasoning.
Complexity/nuance, counterargument, broader context, or style control.

app_modules_to_build.purpose: Student selects thesis sentence; app checks defensibility & prompt alignment.
Highlights quotes/paraphrases and flags missing commentary.
Checks if each paragraph ties back to thesis via connector prompts.
Detects nuance/counterclaim; suggests one sophistication upgrade.
